Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Book: The Emerging Science of Machine Learning Benchmarks 36 upvotes, 0 comments
  2. Write up of my homebrew CPU build 219 upvotes, 45 comments
  3. OpenRocket 273 upvotes, 61 comments
  4. Using calculus to do number theory 92 upvotes, 17 comments
  5. Show HN: I built 48 lightweight SVG backgrounds you can copy/paste 60 upvotes, 10 comments
  6. On a Boat 103 upvotes, 21 comments
  7. Nightingale – open-source karaoke app that works with any song on your computer 444 upvotes, 127 comments
  8. Snowflake AI Escapes Sandbox and Executes Malware 197 upvotes, 61 comments
  9. FBI is buying location data to track US citizens, director confirms 168 upvotes, 57 comments
  10. 2025 Turing award given for quantum information science 63 upvotes, 18 comments
  11. Despite Doubts, Federal Cyber Experts Approved Microsoft Cloud Service 401 upvotes, 183 comments
  12. Show HN: Hacker News archive (47M+ items, 11.6GB) as Parquet, updated every 5m 222 upvotes, 96 comments
  13. Rob Pike’s Rules of Programming (1989) 766 upvotes, 383 comments
  14. Wander – A tiny, decentralised tool to explore the small web 108 upvotes, 46 comments
  15. Remove your ring camera with a claw hammer 13 upvotes, 2 comments
  16. Death to Scroll Fade 307 upvotes, 168 comments
  17. NYC High School Student Freed After 10 Months in ICE Detention 9 upvotes, 1 comments
  18. CVE-2026-3888: Important Snap Flaw Enables Local Privilege Escalation to Root 57 upvotes, 26 comments
  19. Machine Payments Protocol (MPP) 107 upvotes, 58 comments
  20. Nvidia NemoClaw 177 upvotes, 132 comments
  21. Review: Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra 32 upvotes, 17 comments
  22. Show HN: Playing LongTurn FreeCiv with Friends 26 upvotes, 15 comments
  23. Show HN: Tmux-IDE, OSS agent-first terminal IDE 36 upvotes, 25 comments
  24. Explore 19th Century Scientific Correspondence 3 upvotes, 0 comments
  25. Show HN: Will my flight have Starlink? 95 upvotes, 92 comments
  26. AI coding is gambling 269 upvotes, 306 comments
  27. Measuring progress toward AGI: A cognitive framework 72 upvotes, 133 comments
  28. Trevor Milton is raising funds for a new jet he claims will transform flying 49 upvotes, 85 comments
  29. I haven't used a mouse for 14 years 32 upvotes, 55 comments
  30. Warranty Void If Regenerated 9 upvotes, 30 comments

Last generated 5:30am, 19 March 2026. Source here.
